label: Use Case
desc: Application onboarding — who owns this AI system, what does it do, who does it affect.

label: Risk Classification
desc: Classify the application's intrinsic risk profile and assign a governance tier.

label: Technical Architecture
desc: Identify the regulatory landscape and applicable governance controls.

label: Data Readiness
desc: Validate data quality and bias governance.

label: Data Integration
desc: Confirm telemetry pipeline is live and metrics are flowing.

label: Security
desc: Validate security, oversight, and operational controls.

label: Infrastructure
desc: Benchmark against peer applications in the same risk tier.

label: Solution Design
desc: Measure alignment with regulatory requirements and peer adoption.

label: System Performance
desc: Continuous live governance — tier transitions, KPI drift, recommendations.
